from flask import Flask, request
import requests

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/x', methods=['POST'])
def handler():
    user_url = request.json['user_url']

    resp = requests.models.Response()
    resp.request = requests.Request('GET', 'https://example.com').prepare()
    req = requests.Request('GET', user_url)
    prep = req.prepare()
    s.rebuild_auth(prep, resp)
    return 'done'

from flask import Flask, request
import requests

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/x', methods=['POST'])
def handler():
    s = requests.Session()
    resp = requests.models.Response()
    resp.request = requests.Request('GET', 'https://example.com').prepare()
    req = requests.Request('GET', 'http://example.com/safe')
    prep = req.prepare()
    s.rebuild_auth(prep, resp)
    return 'done'

from flask import Flask, request
import requests
app = Flask(__name__)
@app.route('/x', methods=['POST'])
def handler():
    tainted_proxies = request.json['proxies']
    session = requests.Session()
    req = requests.Request('GET', 'http://example.com')
    prep = req.prepare()
    session.rebuild_proxies(prep, tainted_proxies)
    return str('done')

perCve.vulnerableFixture:
from flask import Flask, request
import cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 as pkcs12
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes, serialization
import x509

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/x', methods=['POST'])
def handler():
    key_data = request.json['key']
    cert_data = request.json['cert']
    password = request.json['password']
    
    key = serialization.load_pem_private_key(key_data.encode(), None)
    cert = x509.load_pem_x509_certificate(cert_data.encode())
    
    encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().hmac_hash(hashes.SHA256()).build(password.encode())
    
    result = pkcs12.serialize_key_and_certificates(
        b"name", key, cert, [], encryption
    )
    return result
perCve.safeFixture:
from flask import Flask, request
import cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 as pkcs12
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes, serialization
import x509

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/x', methods=['POST'])
def handler():
    key = serialization.load_pem_private_key(b"-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\nMIIBOgIBAAJBALi6gJ...\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----", None)
    cert = x509.load_pem_x509_certificate(b"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIIBgDCC...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----")
    
    encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().hmac_hash(hashes.SHA256()).build(b"static-password")
    
    result = pkcs12.serialize_key_and_certificates(
        b"name", key, cert, [], encryption
    )
    return result
